horoscope.title: Mesha / Mesha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Mesha Rashi, Today can bring support through people. Focus on confidence and quick decisions. Partner, client, friend, or group talks can become useful. Keep agreements clear and write important points down. Avoid pleasing everyone and forgetting your own need. Your lucky color is saffron and your lucky number is 2.

horoscope.title: Brisha / Vrishabha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Brisha Rashi, Today asks you to protect peace around you. Focus on money, food, family, and steady work. Home and close relations can feel better with gentle behavior. Give time to rest, food, and small family duties. Avoid taking every small word personally. Your lucky color is green and your lucky number is 9.

nepali.paragraph: वृष राशिका लागि आज वरिपरिको शान्ति जोगाउनु राम्रो हुन्छ। पैसा, खाना, परिवार र स्थिर काममा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। नरम व्यवहारले घर र नजिकका सम्बन्ध सहज बन्न सक्छन्। आराम, खाना र साना पारिवारिक काममा समय दिनुहोस्। हरेक सानो कुरालाई मनमा धेरै नलिनुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग हरियो र शुभ अंक 9 हो।

english.paragraph: For Karkat Rashi, Today may feel a little deep. Focus on home, feelings, comfort, and family peace. Prayer, quiet work, and careful thinking can help. horoscope.title: Singha / Simha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Singha Rashi, Today can help practical work and responsibility. Focus on respect, planning, children, and creative work. People may notice your effort if you stay steady. Finish duty first and keep your tone warm. Avoid pressure without rest and avoid cold replies. Your lucky color is blue and your lucky number is 3.

horoscope.title: Kanya / Kanya Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Kanya Rashi, Today is better for slow and steady work. Focus on routine, details, health habits, and pending work. Old pending work can move ahead if you keep patience. Check money, documents, and promises before saying yes. Avoid stubborn words and careless buying. Your lucky color is cream and your lucky number is 1.

nepali.paragraph: कन्या राशिका लागि आज ढिलो तर स्थिर कामका लागि राम्रो छ। दिनचर्या, विवरण, स्वास्थ्य बानी र बाँकी काममा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। धैर्य राख्दा पुरानो बाँकी काम अघि बढ्न सक्छ। हुन्छ भन्नु अघि पैसा, कागज र वाचा जाँच्नुहोस्। जिद्दी बोली र लापरवाही किनमेलबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग क्रिम र शुभ अंक 1 हो।

horoscope.title: Tula / Tula Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Tula Rashi, Today supports learning and wise advice. Focus on balance, partner talks, clients, and agreements. Guidance from a trusted person can be useful. Plan travel, study, or prayer with a calm mind. Avoid careless promises and blunt words. Your lucky color is white and your lucky number is 8.

nepali.paragraph: तुला राशिका लागि आज सिकाइ र बुद्धिमानी सल्लाहमा साथ मिल्छ। सन्तुलन, जोडीसँग कुरा, ग्राहक र सहमतिमा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। विश्वासिलो व्यक्तिबाट आएको मार्गदर्शन उपयोगी हुन सक्छ। यात्रा, पढाइ वा प्रार्थनाको योजना शान्त मनले बनाउनुहोस्। लापरवाही वाचा र कडा बोलीबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग सेतो र शुभ अंक 8 हो।

horoscope.title: Makar / Makara Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Makar Rashi, Today asks for rest and careful spending. Focus on duty, work, discipline, and long-term plans. Quiet work can give better results than noise. Take a short walk, drink water, and keep expenses clear. Avoid confusion and late-night overthinking. Your lucky color is saffron and your lucky number is 2.

nepali.paragraph: मकर राशिका लागि आज आराम र खर्चमा सावधानी चाहिन्छ। जिम्मेवारी, काम, अनुशासन र लामो योजनामा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। हल्लाभन्दा शान्त कामले राम्रो नतिजा दिन सक्छ। छोटो हिँडाइ गर्नुहोस्, पानी पिउनुहोस् र खर्च स्पष्ट राख्नुहोस्। अलमल र राति धेरै सोच्ने बानीबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग केशरी र शुभ अंक 2 हो।

english.paragraph: For Kumbha Rashi, Today can bring support through people. Focus on friends, groups, online work, and future plans. Partner, client, friend, or group talks can become useful. horoscope.title: Kumbha / Kumbha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Kumbha Rashi, Today can bring support through people. Focus on friends, groups, online work, and future plans. Partner, client, friend, or group talks can become useful. Keep agreements clear and write important points down. Avoid pleasing everyone and forgetting your own need. Your lucky color is green and your lucky number is 9.

nepali.paragraph: कुम्भ राशिका लागि आज मानिसहरूबाट साथ मिल्न सक्छ। साथी, समूह, अनलाइन काम र भविष्यको योजनामा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। जोडी, ग्राहक, साथी वा समूहसँगको कुरा उपयोगी हुन सक्छ। सहमति स्पष्ट राख्नुहोस् र मुख्य कुरा लेखेर राख्नुहोस्। सबैलाई खुसी पार्दा आफ्नो आवश्यकता नबिर्सनुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग हरियो र शुभ अंक 9 हो।

horoscope.title: Meen / Meena Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Meen Rashi, Today asks you to protect peace around you. Focus on rest, quiet work, prayer, and careful spending. Home and close relations can feel better with gentle behavior. Give time to rest, food, and small family duties. Avoid taking every small word personally. Your lucky color is yellow and your lucky number is 7.

nepali.paragraph: मीन राशिका लागि आज वरिपरिको शान्ति जोगाउनु राम्रो हुन्छ। आराम, शान्त काम, प्रार्थना र खर्चमा सावधानीमा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। नरम व्यवहारले घर र नजिकका सम्बन्ध सहज बन्न सक्छन्। आराम, खाना र साना पारिवारिक काममा समय दिनुहोस्। हरेक सानो कुरालाई मनमा धेरै नलिनुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग पहेंलो र शुभ अंक 7 हो।

horoscope.title: Brisha / Vrishabha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Brisha Rashi, Today can help practical work and responsibility. Focus on money, food, family, and steady work. People may notice your effort if you stay steady. Finish duty first and keep your tone warm. Avoid pressure without rest and avoid cold replies. Your lucky color is cream and your lucky number is 1.

nepali.paragraph: वृष राशिका लागि आज व्यवहारिक काम र जिम्मेवारीमा साथ मिल्न सक्छ। पैसा, खाना, परिवार र स्थिर काममा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। स्थिर रहँदा तपाईंको मेहनत अरूले देख्न सक्छन्। पहिले जिम्मेवारी पूरा गर्नुहोस् र बोली न्यानो राख्नुहोस्। आराम बिना धेरै दबाब र चिसो जवाफबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग क्रिम र शुभ अंक 1 हो।

english.paragraph: For Mithun Rashi, Today is better for slow and steady work. Focus on talks, messages, study, and short movement. Old pending work can move ahead if you keep patience. Check money, documents, and promises before saying yes. Avoid stubborn words and careless buying. Your lucky color is white and your lucky number is 8.

horoscope.title: Karkat / Karka Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Karkat Rashi, Today supports learning and wise advice. Focus on home, feelings, comfort, and family peace. Guidance from a trusted person can be useful. Plan travel, study, or prayer with a calm mind. Avoid careless promises and blunt words. Your lucky color is brown and your lucky number is 6.

nepali.paragraph: कर्कट राशिका लागि आज सिकाइ र बुद्धिमानी सल्लाहमा साथ मिल्छ। घर, भावना, आराम र पारिवारिक शान्तिमा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। विश्वासिलो व्यक्तिबाट आएको मार्गदर्शन उपयोगी हुन सक्छ। यात्रा, पढाइ वा प्रार्थनाको योजना शान्त मनले बनाउनुहोस्। लापरवाही वाचा र कडा बोलीबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग खैरो र शुभ अंक 6 हो।

horoscope.title: Karkat / Karka Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Karkat Rashi, Today supports learning and wise advice. Focus on home, feelings, comfort, and family peace. Guidance from a trusted person can be useful. Plan travel, study, or prayer with a calm mind. Avoid careless promises and blunt words. Your lucky color is brown and your lucky number is 6.

nepali.paragraph: कर्कट राशिका लागि आज सिकाइ र बुद्धिमानी सल्लाहमा साथ मिल्छ। घर, भावना, आराम र पारिवारिक शान्तिमा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। विश्वासिलो व्यक्तिबाट आएको मार्गदर्शन उपयोगी हुन सक्छ। यात्रा, पढाइ वा प्रार्थनाको योजना शान्त मनले बनाउनुहोस्। लापरवाही वाचा र कडा बोलीबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग खैरो र शुभ अंक 6 हो।

horoscope.title: Singha / Simha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Singha Rashi, Today is good for careful improvement. Focus on respect, planning, children, and creative work. Small discipline can bring relief in work or health habits. Clean one detail and keep your routine light. Avoid criticizing others too much. Your lucky color is red and your lucky number is 4.

nepali.paragraph: सिंह राशिका लागि आज सावधानीपूर्वक सुधारका लागि राम्रो छ। सम्मान, योजना, सन्तान र सिर्जनात्मक काममा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। सानो अनुशासनले काम वा स्वास्थ्य बानीमा राहत दिन सक्छ। एउटा विवरण मिलाउनुहोस् र दिनचर्या हल्का राख्नुहोस्। अरूलाई धेरै आलोचना नगर्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग रातो र शुभ अंक 4 हो।

horoscope.title: Tula / Tula Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Tula Rashi, Today asks for rest and careful spending. Focus on balance, partner talks, clients, and agreements. Quiet work can give better results than noise. Take a short walk, drink water, and keep expenses clear. Avoid confusion and late-night overthinking. Your lucky color is green and your lucky number is 9.

nepali.paragraph: तुला राशिका लागि आज आराम र खर्चमा सावधानी चाहिन्छ। सन्तुलन, जोडीसँग कुरा, ग्राहक र सहमतिमा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। हल्लाभन्दा शान्त कामले राम्रो नतिजा दिन सक्छ। छोटो हिँडाइ गर्नुहोस्, पानी पिउनुहोस् र खर्च स्पष्ट राख्नुहोस्। अलमल र राति धेरै सोच्ने बानीबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग हरियो र शुभ अंक 9 हो।

horoscope.title: Brischik / Vrischika Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Brischik Rashi, Today can bring support through people. Focus on deep thinking, private matters, and careful money choices. Partner, client, friend, or group talks can become useful. Keep agreements clear and write important points down. Avoid pleasing everyone and forgetting your own need. Your lucky color is yellow and your lucky number is 7.

horoscope.title: Dhanu / Dhanu Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Dhanu Rashi, Today asks you to protect peace around you. Focus on learning, guidance, prayer, and travel planning. Home and close relations can feel better with gentle behavior. Give time to rest, food, and small family duties. Avoid taking every small word personally. Your lucky color is sky blue and your lucky number is 5.

nepali.paragraph: धनु राशिका लागि आज वरिपरिको शान्ति जोगाउनु राम्रो हुन्छ। सिकाइ, मार्गदर्शन, प्रार्थना र यात्राको योजनामा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। नरम व्यवहारले घर र नजिकका सम्बन्ध सहज बन्न सक्छन्। आराम, खाना र साना पारिवारिक काममा समय दिनुहोस्। हरेक सानो कुरालाई मनमा धेरै नलिनुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग आकाशे निलो र शुभ अंक 5 हो।

horoscope.title: Dhanu / Dhanu Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Dhanu Rashi, Today asks you to protect peace around you. Focus on learning, guidance, prayer, and travel planning. Home and close relations can feel better with gentle behavior. Give time to rest, food, and small family duties. Avoid taking every small word personally. Your lucky color is sky blue and your lucky number is 5.

nepali.paragraph: धनु राशिका लागि आज वरिपरिको शान्ति जोगाउनु राम्रो हुन्छ। सिकाइ, मार्गदर्शन, प्रार्थना र यात्राको योजनामा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। नरम व्यवहारले घर र नजिकका सम्बन्ध सहज बन्न सक्छन्। आराम, खाना र साना पारिवारिक काममा समय दिनुहोस्। हरेक सानो कुरालाई मनमा धेरै नलिनुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग आकाशे निलो र शुभ अंक 5 हो।

horoscope.title: Makar / Makara Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Makar Rashi, Today can feel normal but useful. Focus on duty, work, discipline, and long-term plans. A calm mind can help you finish one important task. Speak softly with family and keep your work simple. Avoid rushing, anger, and extra spending. Your lucky color is blue and your lucky number is 3.

nepali.paragraph: मकर राशिका लागि आज दिन सामान्य तर उपयोगी हुन सक्छ। जिम्मेवारी, काम, अनुशासन र लामो योजनामा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। शान्त मनले एउटा मुख्य काम पूरा गर्न मद्दत गर्छ। परिवारसँग नरम बोली बोल्नुहोस् र काम सरल राख्नुहोस्। हडबड, रिस र अनावश्यक खर्चबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग निलो र शुभ अंक 3 हो।

horoscope.title: Meen / Meena Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Meen Rashi, Today can help practical work and responsibility. Focus on rest, quiet work, prayer, and careful spending. People may notice your effort if you stay steady. Finish duty first and keep your tone warm. Avoid pressure without rest and avoid cold replies. Your lucky color is white and your lucky number is 8.

nepali.paragraph: मीन राशिका लागि आज व्यवहारिक काम र जिम्मेवारीमा साथ मिल्न सक्छ। आराम, शान्त काम, प्रार्थना र खर्चमा सावधानीमा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। स्थिर रहँदा तपाईंको मेहनत अरूले देख्न सक्छन्। पहिले जिम्मेवारी पूरा गर्नुहोस् र बोली न्यानो राख्नुहोस्। आराम बिना धेरै दबाब र चिसो जवाफबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग सेतो र शुभ अंक 8 हो।

english.paragraph: For Brisha Rashi, Today is good for careful improvement. Focus on money, food, family, and steady work. Small discipline can bring relief in work or health habits. horoscope.title: Singha / Simha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Singha Rashi, Today can bring support through people. Focus on respect, planning, children, and creative work. Partner, client, friend, or group talks can become useful. Keep agreements clear and write important points down. Avoid pleasing everyone and forgetting your own need. Your lucky color is sky blue and your lucky number is 5.

nepali.paragraph: सिंह राशिका लागि आज मानिसहरूबाट साथ मिल्न सक्छ। सम्मान, योजना, सन्तान र सिर्जनात्मक काममा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। जोडी, ग्राहक, साथी वा समूहसँगको कुरा उपयोगी हुन सक्छ। सहमति स्पष्ट राख्नुहोस् र मुख्य कुरा लेखेर राख्नुहोस्। सबैलाई खुसी पार्दा आफ्नो आवश्यकता नबिर्सनुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग आकाशे निलो र शुभ अंक 5 हो।

horoscope.title: Kanya / Kanya Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Kanya Rashi, Today asks you to protect peace around you. Focus on routine, details, health habits, and pending work. Home and close relations can feel better with gentle behavior. Give time to rest, food, and small family duties. Avoid taking every small word personally. Your lucky color is blue and your lucky number is 3.

nepali.paragraph: कन्या राशिका लागि आज वरिपरिको शान्ति जोगाउनु राम्रो हुन्छ। दिनचर्या, विवरण, स्वास्थ्य बानी र बाँकी काममा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। नरम व्यवहारले घर र नजिकका सम्बन्ध सहज बन्न सक्छन्। आराम, खाना र साना पारिवारिक काममा समय दिनुहोस्। हरेक सानो कुरालाई मनमा धेरै नलिनुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग निलो र शुभ अंक 3 हो।

english.paragraph: For Tula Rashi, Today can feel normal but useful. Focus on balance, partner talks, clients, and agreements. A calm mind can help you finish one important task. Speak softly with family and keep your work simple. Avoid rushing, anger, and extra spending. Your lucky color is cream and your lucky number is 1.

horoscope.title: Brischik / Vrischika Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Brischik Rashi, Today may feel a little deep. Focus on deep thinking, private matters, and careful money choices. Prayer, quiet work, and careful thinking can help. Keep money and private matters simple. Avoid fear, secrecy, and risky choices. Your lucky color is white and your lucky number is 8.

horoscope.title: Makar / Makara Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Makar Rashi, Today is better for slow and steady work. Focus on duty, work, discipline, and long-term plans. Old pending work can move ahead if you keep patience. Check money, documents, and promises before saying yes. Avoid stubborn words and careless buying. Your lucky color is red and your lucky number is 4.

nepali.paragraph: मकर राशिका लागि आज ढिलो तर स्थिर कामका लागि राम्रो छ। जिम्मेवारी, काम, अनुशासन र लामो योजनामा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। धैर्य राख्दा पुरानो बाँकी काम अघि बढ्न सक्छ। हुन्छ भन्नु अघि पैसा, कागज र वाचा जाँच्नुहोस्। जिद्दी बोली र लापरवाही किनमेलबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग रातो र शुभ अंक 4 हो।

horoscope.title: Meen / Meena Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Meen Rashi, Today is good for careful improvement. Focus on rest, quiet work, prayer, and careful spending. Small discipline can bring relief in work or health habits. Clean one detail and keep your routine light. Avoid criticizing others too much. Your lucky color is green and your lucky number is 9.

nepali.paragraph: मीन राशिका लागि आज सावधानीपूर्वक सुधारका लागि राम्रो छ। आराम, शान्त काम, प्रार्थना र खर्चमा सावधानीमा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। सानो अनुशासनले काम वा स्वास्थ्य बानीमा राहत दिन सक्छ। एउटा विवरण मिलाउनुहोस् र दिनचर्या हल्का राख्नुहोस्। अरूलाई धेरै आलोचना नगर्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग हरियो र शुभ अंक 9 हो।

horoscope.title: Mesha / Mesha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Mesha Rashi, Today asks for rest and careful spending. Focus on confidence and quick decisions. Quiet work can give better results than noise. Take a short walk, drink water, and keep expenses clear. Avoid confusion and late-night overthinking. Your lucky color is sky blue and your lucky number is 5.

horoscope.title: Mithun / Mithuna Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Mithun Rashi, Today asks you to protect peace around you. Focus on talks, messages, study, and short movement. Home and close relations can feel better with gentle behavior. Give time to rest, food, and small family duties. Avoid taking every small word personally. Your lucky color is cream and your lucky number is 1.

nepali.paragraph: मिथुन राशिका लागि आज वरिपरिको शान्ति जोगाउनु राम्रो हुन्छ। कुरा, सन्देश, पढाइ र छोटो यात्रामा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। नरम व्यवहारले घर र नजिकका सम्बन्ध सहज बन्न सक्छन्। आराम, खाना र साना पारिवारिक काममा समय दिनुहोस्। हरेक सानो कुरालाई मनमा धेरै नलिनुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग क्रिम र शुभ अंक 1 हो।

english.paragraph: For Singha Rashi, Today may feel a little deep. Focus on respect, planning, children, and creative work. Prayer, quiet work, and careful thinking can help. Keep money and private matters simple. Avoid fear, secrecy, and risky choices. Your lucky color is brown and your lucky number is 6.

horoscope.title: Singha / Simha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Singha Rashi, Today may feel a little deep. Focus on respect, planning, children, and creative work. Prayer, quiet work, and careful thinking can help. Keep money and private matters simple. Avoid fear, secrecy, and risky choices. Your lucky color is brown and your lucky number is 6.

nepali.paragraph: सिंह राशिका लागि आज मन अलि गहिरो हुन सक्छ। सम्मान, योजना, सन्तान र सिर्जनात्मक काममा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। प्रार्थना, शान्त काम र सावधानीपूर्वक सोचले मद्दत गर्छ। पैसा र गोप्य कुरा सरल राख्नुहोस्। डर, धेरै गोपनीयता र जोखिमपूर्ण निर्णयबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग खैरो र शुभ अंक 6 हो।

horoscope.title: Kanya / Kanya Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Kanya Rashi, Today can help practical work and responsibility. Focus on routine, details, health habits, and pending work. People may notice your effort if you stay steady. Finish duty first and keep your tone warm. Avoid pressure without rest and avoid cold replies. Your lucky color is red and your lucky number is 4.

horoscope.title: Brischik / Vrischika Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Brischik Rashi, Today supports learning and wise advice. Focus on deep thinking, private matters, and careful money choices. Guidance from a trusted person can be useful. Plan travel, study, or prayer with a calm mind. Avoid careless promises and blunt words. Your lucky color is green and your lucky number is 9.

nepali.paragraph: वृश्चिक राशिका लागि आज सिकाइ र बुद्धिमानी सल्लाहमा साथ मिल्छ। गहिरो सोच, गोप्य कुरा र पैसामा सावधानीमा ध्यान दिँदा राम्रो हुन्छ। विश्वासिलो व्यक्तिबाट आएको मार्गदर्शन उपयोगी हुन सक्छ। यात्रा, पढाइ वा प्रार्थनाको योजना शान्त मनले बनाउनुहोस्। लापरवाही वाचा र कडा बोलीबाट बच्नुहोस्। आजको शुभ रंग हरियो र शुभ अंक 9 हो।

horoscope.title: Kumbha / Kumbha Rashi Phal

english.paragraph: For Kumbha Rashi, Today asks for rest and careful spending. Focus on friends, groups, online work, and future plans. Quiet work can give better results than noise. Take a short walk, drink water, and keep expenses clear. Avoid confusion and late-night overthinking. Your lucky color is blue and your lucky number is 3.
